/usr/lib/ccache/cc -std=c89 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/test/cc/test_parse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/lex.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/pp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/type.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/parse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/diag.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/ext_asm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-cc-test_parse.dir/src/cc/c11.c.o" -o test-cc-test_parse  libfree.a
